Ukraine.title: 乌克兰 says 俄罗斯 军队 推进 on eastern front
Ukraine.summary: Ukrainian 军事 officials 报道称 continued 俄罗斯 advances in the eastern Donbas region, with heavy fighting around Avdiivka and Bakhmut.

Ukraine.title: 北约 allies discuss increased 支持 for 乌克兰
Ukraine.summary: 北约 国防 ministers met to discuss increasing 军事 支持 for 乌克兰 amid ongoing 冲突 with 俄罗斯.

US.summary: The United States has 警告 伊朗 against further escalation of its 核武器 program, saying all options remain on the table.

Israel.title: 以色列 conducts strikes in 加沙 after rocket fire
Israel.summary: The 以色列的 军事 carried out 空袭 in 加沙 overnight following rocket attacks from 巴勒斯坦 militants.
